rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §21.904, which governs a teacher residency preservice program. No overlapping provisions or dependencies exist.
quote: Sec. 21.904. PREPARING AND RETAINING EDUCATORS THROUGH PARTNERSHIP RESIDENCY PRESERVICE PROGRAM.
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns educator preparation partnerships and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
